name: write_hw_emu_dir
short_description: Write the Xilinx Shell Archive for the current design
full_help:
write_hw_emu_dir

Description: 
Write the Xilinx Shell Archive for the current design

Syntax: 
write_hw_emu_dir  [-force] [-quiet] [-verbose] [<output_dir>]

Returns: 
The name of the Shell file

Usage: 
  Name            Description
  ---------------------------
  [-force]        Overwrite existing output directory
  [-quiet]        Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]      Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<output_dir>]  Output directory name
                  Default: .

Categories: 
Vitis, Platform, FileIO

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
